Our Journey

30 Years of
Creative Vision

AVB Media Asia is a full-service production house based in Bali, with offices in Jakarta and Singapore. Established in 1993, we have grown from a local TV commercial studio into a fully integrated digital media powerhouse serving 100+ reputable brands across 10+ industries worldwide.

Our managing director brings over 30 years of expertise, having led productions for Marriott International, IHG Hotel Group, Alam Sutera, and governments across Asia.

30+Years Experience
100+Brands Served
10+Industries
Timeline
1993

Founded in Bali

Established as a production house for TV commercials, music videos, and corporate content.

2010

Digital Transformation

Transitioned to full digital production, expanding into brand strategy and digital marketing.

2014

Alpha Seven

Launched our event management subsidiary trusted for national and international events.

2015

Bali Go Live Channel

Created a dedicated Bali content platform with fresh videos every week.

2016

Union Studio

Launched a sophisticated indoor photo & video studio in Seminyak, available 24 hours.

2018

International Expansion

Extended to Jakarta and Singapore, serving international businesses across Asia and beyond.

Digital Beauties

What We Create

Beauty is in the eye of the beholder but only professionally curated content will speak the truth about your brand.

Brand Strategy

Communication, campaign, and creative strategy. We build brand identities that resonate deeply encompassing brand mission, positioning, and promises to customers.

IdentityPositioningCampaign
Digital Content Production

Company profile videos, TV commercials, hotel & resort videos, aerial videography, and destination films.

VideoTVCAerial
Photography

Architectural, F&B, product, and aerial photography. Every image crafted to showcase your brand in its best light.

CommercialHospitalityAerial
Creative Design

Digital art, print art, lithography, advertising layouts, and motion graphics. Visual storytelling across every medium.

MotionPrintDigital Art
Post Production

Editing, motion graphics, and color grading. We perfect every frame into cinematic stories that exceed expectations.

Color GradeVFXAudio
Event Management

Via subsidiary Alpha Seven full-service MICE documentation, live streaming, and event production.

MICELive StreamDocumentation

Our Focus

Empowering
Brands & People

Our tagline is more than words it's our commitment to brands and the people behind them.

Empowering Brand
Strength & Support

We empower clients with tools, strategies, and confidence to thrive enabling brands to stand out and achieve long-term growth.

Partnership & Collaboration

We deeply understand our clients' needs, creating solutions aligned with their vision through open communication.

Leadership & Innovation

We help clients lead their industries by pushing creative boundaries and setting new standards.

Empowering People
Human-Centric Approach

At the heart of everything we do are the individuals who drive brands forward every decision starts with people.

Impact on Lives

Empowering people goes beyond business it's about touching lives meaningfully and fostering personal fulfillment.

Community & Culture

We create inclusive environments around every brand where creativity and personal growth truly thrive.

Overall Impact
Balanced Focus

Empowering both brands and individuals drives a holistic approach success through impactful branding AND human growth.

Positive & Uplifting

Our unwavering commitment to fostering hope, progress, and support for every brand and person we work with.

Memorable & Distinctive

Concise yet impactful we are partners who provide exceptional branding AND wholeheartedly nurture growth.
